description_long: This object is a stylized, blocky representation of a rifle, constructed with angular and geometric forms. The main body is rectangular, with a prominent upper receiver and a lower section that extends into a squared-off stock. The barrel is short and thick, integrated into the front of the body, and there are no visible fine details such as a trigger, magazine, or sighting system. The structure is supported by a series of frame-like elements, giving it an industrial, almost architectural appearance. The surface is uniformly colored in a matte gray, with no visible markings or textures. The overall design is abstract and minimalist, lacking the typical curves and ergonomic features of a real-world rifle.
description: A blocky, abstract rifle with a rectangular body, thick barrel, and squared stock, all in matte gray. The design is minimalist and industrial, lacking fine details.
description_view_0: From this angle, the squared stock and the main body are most prominent, with the barrel barely visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the open frame structure beneath the main body and shows the rifle's width and industrial design.
description_view_2: Here, the front of the rifle is visible, showing the thick, short barrel and the flat face of the body.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the top and side surfaces, revealing the flat, geometric construction and the lack of detailed features.
